data.title: Founding Modern: Radical Design from the 19th Century
data.description: Discover the radical and world changing design of the Arts and Crafts and Secessionist Movements.
data.intro: This tour takes listeners to the end of the 19th century, when designers from the UK and Vienna were completely reimagining a philosophy of design. From chairs to clocks, these designers sought to ...
